stories.title: Wire DI factories into 4 route files and update 2 test mocks
acceptance_criteria: feed.ts, card.ts, upload.ts, whatsapp.ts use createRateLimiter/createClassifier instead of checkRateLimit/classify
openapi-vote.test.ts and openapi-translation-report.test.ts mock createRateLimiter instead of checkRateLimit
stories.context:
EXACT FILES TO CHANGE (no exploration needed):

Factories already exist:
- src/worker/lib/rate-limiter.ts:107 exports createRateLimiter(cache: KVNamespace)
- src/worker/lib/classifier.ts:136 exports createClassifier(ai: Ai)

Route files to update (4 files):
1. src/worker/routes/feed.ts:5 — change import from checkRateLimit to createRateLimiter (keep applyRateLimitHeaders and ROUTE_RATE_LIMITS). Create limiter at handler top: const limiter = createRateLimiter(c.env.CACHE). Replace checkRateLimit(c.env.CACHE, ...) calls with limiter(...).
2. src/worker/routes/card.ts:7 — same pattern as feed.ts.
3. src/worker/routes/upload.ts:4-5 — imports both checkRateLimit and classify. Replace with createRateLimiter and createClassifier. Create both at handler top.
4. src/worker/routes/whatsapp.ts:3,5 — imports classify and checkRateLimit. Replace with createClassifier and createRateLimiter.

Test files to update (2 files):
1. src/worker/routes/openapi-vote.test.ts:6,11 — change mock from checkRateLimit to createRateLimiter. Mock createRateLimiter to return a mock function.
2. src/worker/routes/openapi-translation-report.test.ts:30,35 — same pattern.

DO NOT explore or read other files. These 6 files are the COMPLETE scope. Make the changes, then run: npx vitest run.
